required_changes: Rebuild direct resource region [7,1]->[8,1]: split the resources into staged sub-regions and add pressure on the easiest internal route before the richest rewards.
Rebuild the connection between gem regions [1,1]->[2,2] and [1,4]->[1,6]: add a stronger route gate or separate the regions so the easiest connection no longer dominates other gem-region choices.
Rebuild the connection between gem regions [8,4]->[11,7] and [10,8]->[10,8]: add a stronger route gate or separate the regions so the easiest connection no longer dominates other gem-region choices.
Rebuild the connection between gem regions [8,4]->[11,7] and [11,9]->[11,10]: add a stronger route gate or separate the regions so the easiest connection no longer dominates other gem-region choices.

Rebuild the connection between gem regions [10,8]->[10,8] and [11,9]->[11,10]: add a stronger route gate or separate the regions so the easiest connection no longer dominates other gem-region choices.
summary: Gem route balance reviewer found 5 route/resource imbalance issue(s).
